subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast voiced praise in remembrance of thy Supreme Lord, thou hast heard the scratching of the Most Glorious Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من نطق بالثناء فى ذکر ربه الاعلى قد سمع صریر القلم الابهى فى
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @belief and denial, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude
